entities.name: ZERAZERA SORGHUM
entities.description: A specific type of sorghum known for its agronomic eliteness and distribution in Sudan and Ethiopia

entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: A country where Zerazera sorghums are distributed and from which they were introduced to Ethiopia

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A country where Zerazera sorghums are distributed, specifically in the Gambella area

entities.name: AGRONOMIC ELITENESS
entities.description: A characteristic of Zerazera sorghums that makes them valuable for improvement programs

entities.name: SORGHUM IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Agricultural initiatives aimed at enhancing sorghum varieties, utilizing Zerazera sorghums

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where sorghum improvement programs utilizing Zerazera sorghums are implemented

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization that conducted extensive collections of Zerazera sorghums in Sudan and Ethiopia

entities.name: GAMBELLA AREA
entities.description: A region in Ethiopia where Zerazera sorghums were introduced from Sudan

entities.name: SUBRACE ZERAZERA
entities.description: A taxonomic subrace classification for Zerazera sorghums

entities.name: RACE CAUDATUM
entities.description: A taxonomic race classification under which subrace Zerazera is grouped

relationships.description: source of introduction for Zerazera sorghums
